name: beyondtranslate
desc: BeyondTranslate (formerly Biyi) is a fast, native-experience translation app for macOS, Windows and Linux, built with Flutter and Rust. Capture text from anywh…
descFull: BeyondTranslate (formerly Biyi) is a fast, native-experience translation app for macOS, Windows and Linux, built with Flutter and Rust. Capture text from anywhere on screen and get accurate translations powered by multiple engines.
